heading: Sale of lands unaffected; reservation of mineral rights; sale subject to prior lease; naval petroleum reserves unaffected
label: 353 Sale of lands unaffected; reservation of mineral rights; sale subject to prior lease; naval petroleum reserves unaffected
text: Nothing herein contained shall be deemed or construed to (a) amend, modify, or change any existing law authorizing or requiring the sale of acquired lands, or (b) empower any commission, bureau, or agency of the Government to make a reservation of the minerals in the sale of any acquired land: , That any such sale or conveyance of lands shall be made by the agency having jurisdiction thereof, subject to any lease theretofore made, covering the mineral deposits underlying such lands: , That nothing in this chapter is intended, or shall be construed to affect in any manner any provision of chapter 869 of title 10.ProvidedProvided further
notes: Amendments2018— substituted “chapter 869 of title 10” for “the Act of (), amending the Act of ()”.Pub. L. 115–23232 Stat. 125241 Stat. 813June 30, 1938June 4, 1920
